content.label: STDM
content.value: Dynamic time slots based on active demand

content.label: CWDM
content.value: Coarse wavelength spacing; cheaper; metro links

content.label: DWDM
content.value: Dense wavelength spacing; long-haul; high capacity

content.label: CDMA
content.value: Unique spreading codes over shared spectrum

content.label: 802.11g
content.value: 2.4 GHz; OFDM; backward compatible with b

content.label: SMF
content.value: Single narrow path; long distance; higher cost optics

content.label: MMF
content.value: Multiple light paths; shorter distance; common inside buildings

content.label: Dispersion
content.value: Pulse spreading that can blur signals

content.label: OTDR
content.value: Locates breaks, loss, and reflections in fiber

content.label: LC
content.value: Small form factor fiber connector; common in dense panels

content.label: MTRJ
content.value: Small duplex fiber connector resembling an RJ form factor

content.label: F-type
content.value: Coax connector common with cable TV/modems

content.label: 5G
content.value: High capacity, low latency, massive device support

content.label: Parity
content.value: Simple bit count; weak; misses some errors

content.label: Checksum
content.value: Adds data units and compares result; common in protocols

content.label: CRC
content.value: Strong detection, especially for burst errors

content.label: Layer 1
content.value: Bits, cables, fiber, radio, hubs, repeaters

content.label: Documentation
content.value: Diagrams, IP plans, device inventory, changes

content.label: Guest Wi-Fi
content.value: Separate visitor traffic from internal resources

content.label: Change control
content.value: Plan, approve, test, document, and review changes
